items.text: The detail lived elsewhere — and its lineage matters. D-o-E Circular 24 of 73 established the national policy for agricultural and forestry dwellings. Functional need, tied to financial viability, with the standard occupancy condition. P-P-G 7, Annex E, in 1997 — and then P-P-S 7, Annex A, in 2004 — carried the approach forward, each more or less repeating the last. Until the whole structure was swept away, in March 2012, when the first Framework replaced around a thousand pages of guidance with one short document. The detail did not survive the change. The expectations of decision-makers, in large part, did.

Until the whole structure was swept away, in March 2012, when the first Framework replaced around a thousand pages of guidance with one short document. The detail did not survive the change. The expectations of decision-makers, in large part, did.
